title: I asked you to be my girlfriend
text: Everything started on this day. I was nervous, you were beautiful, and somehow the universe lined everything up perfectly. This was the beginning of the best chapter of my life.

title: Our First Date
text: We went out together for the first time, just the two of us. I remember every detail — what you were wearing, what we talked about, the way you laughed. I knew then that I wanted many more of these moments.

title: First Photo Together
text: We finally captured a moment together. Looking at this photo still makes me smile. You always say the camera doesn't do you justice — I disagree completely.

title: First Gift
text: A small gesture to show how much I was already thinking about you. I wanted you to know that I pay attention — to the things you love, the things that make your eyes light up.

title: First Trip Together
text: Our first adventure as a couple. Traveling with you showed me a whole new side of you — curious, excited, a little chaotic in the best way. I want to see every corner of the world with you.

title: Our Shared Playlist
text: We built a playlist that became the soundtrack to us. Every song on it takes me back to a specific moment, a specific feeling. Music has never meant more to me than it does now.

title: Our Favorite Memory
text: Out of everything this year, this moment stands above the rest. The one we still talk about, still laugh about. The one that made me realize how lucky I am to have you.

title: One Year Together
text: 365 days. 365 reasons to be grateful. You've made this past year the most meaningful of my life. Thank you for choosing me, every single day. Here's to many more.
